example: Do you know the answer? Please tell me.
This is my phone.
I see Peter every morning. I speak to him.
Mark has a nice car. His car is black.

hu: őt / neki (nőnem) / birtokos jelző: az ő ...-a
example: She is my sister. I love her.
We are hungry. Can you help us?
We love our village.
Where are my friends? I want to see them.
They have a dog. Their dog is nice.
The dog has beautiful eyes. Its eyes are blue.
Do you like your new laptop?
We love our village.
It is her favorite sport.
It is her favorite sport.
This is our opinion.
I am a professional.
She is a very nice person.
Can you help me with this box?
It belongs to me.
Excuse me, can you help me with this box?
Can you spell your name?
His dog is very friendly.
